title: VFP Layout Primitive Result
description: Result of running a generic layout primitive (L5) — a proposal (dry-run) or an applied, reversible edit. Primitives are parameter-driven, PDK-agnostic actuators; the intelligence that chooses them lives in a consuming extension, not here.

target.description: Primary subject (a net or instance name), for display.

status.description: proposal = dry-run (no mutation); applied = edit committed as a transaction; failed = the edit could not be made.

changes.description: The concrete changes the primitive would make / made.

required_checks.description: Signoff checks the caller should run after applying, e.g. drc, lvs, pex.

rollback_available.description: true for a proposal or an applied transaction (reversible).

transaction_id.description: The L4 transaction id when status = applied (empty otherwise).

old.description: Prior value: a number (width), a string, or a point [x,y].

new.description: Proposed/new value, same shape as old.
